name: docx_table
description: One consolidated tool for all table operations: create, set_cells, insert_row, insert_col, delete_row, delete_col, merge, style, delete. 'create' inserts a table after a paragraph anchor and returns a table anchor like 'T4'; subsequent ops target that anchor. 'style' applies direct table formatting via props (borders, width, alignment, column widths, shading); 'delete' removes the whole table. Cell text supports '\n' line breaks. Cell addressing accepts zero-based {r, c} pairs or A1 notation.

anchor.description: Table anchor like 'T4'. Required for every op except 'create'.

after.description: Insert the new table after this paragraph anchor like 'P12#e7f8' (op 'create').

header.description: Style the first row as a header row (op 'create').

cells.description: Cells to write (op 'set_cells'). Address each by zero-based {r, c} or A1-style ref.

ref.description: A1-style cell reference like 'B2'. Alternative to r/c.

at.description: Zero-based row/column index for insert_row, insert_col, delete_row, delete_col.

range.description: Cell range in A1 notation like 'A1:C1' (op 'merge').

props.description: Direct table formatting for op 'style' (overrides the named style).

borders.description: true = single grid borders; false = borderless.

border_weight.description: Border line weight in eighths of a point (default 4 = 0.5pt).

width_pct.description: Table width as a percent of the text column (100 = full width).

align.description: Horizontal alignment of the table on the page.

col_widths.description: Per-column widths in twips; sets a fixed table layout.

shading.description: Cell fill: { header: hex|null } and/or { all: hex|null }. null clears.

author.description: Revision author when track_changes is true. Defaults from environment.
